docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT MONZA SPORTS CARS INC. AS TO RESPONDENT EDELSBERG, MARK HEARING SET FOR JAN-15-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2004 - JUDGMENT AWARDED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT MARK EDELSBERG AND AGAINST DEFENDANT/APPELLANT LUIS PROSPATO, INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS MONZA SPORTS CARS, INC. IN THE PRINCIPAL SUM OF $1,000.00 PLUS COSTS IN THE SUM OF $22.00.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDELSBERG, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONZA SPORTS CARS INC. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,022.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
